Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine alumni files, 1876-
Collection Number: 24-4-3326

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine alumni files, 1876-
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
24-4-3326
Abstract:
Biographical files of graduates of the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine.
Creator:
Cornell University. College of Veterinary Medicine
Quanitities:
30.5 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY

The Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine was founded in 1894. It was originally called the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Biographical files of graduates of the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine.
HISTORY OF OWNERSHIP

The history of this collection is uncertain. Much of it was created by the college Alumni Association, but it was added to by the College Library staff as well. Other material may have been added from other sources.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine Alumni Files, #24-04-3326. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
HISTORY OF OWNERSHIP

The history of this collection is uncertain. Much of it was created by the college Alumni Association, but it was added to by the College Library staff as well. Other material may have been added from other sources.
Access Restrictions:

Access to alumni records restricted to college staff only during the lifetime of the student.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Cornell University. College of Veterinary Medicine
Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae.
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine
Subjects:
Universities and colleges -- Alumni and alumnae.
Veterinarians
